overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a first-person perspective walking through a vibrant neon-lit Asian market street at night, then climbing a structure to traverse rooftops. The environment features holographic cherry blossoms, dense cyberpunk architecture, and heavy artificial lighting with pink and cyan neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian market with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the market street past stalls and an NCPD officer, moving toward the center of the market

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard near a market stall

entered.detail: large canvas awning covering food stall with warm lighting underneath
bright red automated vending kiosk with illuminated product display
large holographic advertisement with cyan and pink lighting on building facade
glowing pink holographic tree projection between buildings
transparent counter surface in immediate foreground reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level in a cyberpunk market street at night. The player walks forward past an NCPD officer standing near a stall with a yellow canopy. Neon signs and holographic cherry blossoms illuminate the background while the camera moves through the pedestrian area toward the center of the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical climb on building exterior fire escape

events.description: character transitions from walking to climbing up a metal structure
perspective shifts from ground level to elevated view overlooking the market below

agents.ego_description: climbing up a metal fire escape or ladder attached to the building facade

entered.detail: vertical ladder and metal rungs attached to building wall with red accents
dark metal and concrete building facade with pipes and industrial details

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a metal fire escape structure attached to the building. The camera tilts upward as the ground level recedes, transitioning from a horizontal street view to a vertical climb. The market canopies become visible below as the perspective shifts to an elevated vantage point.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop walkway overlooking neon market district

events.description: transition from vertical climbing to horizontal traversal along rooftop

agents.ego_description: walking along a high rooftop structure looking down at the market stalls and streets below

entered.detail: narrow concrete path along building roof with metal railings
large industrial HVAC equipment with steam vents emitting white vapor
rising steam effects drifting across the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: Now at rooftop level, the camera moves horizontally along a high structure overlooking the market district below. Steam rises from vents near industrial air conditioning units. The yellow market canopies are visible as a top-down view far below, while neon signs continue to illuminate the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a vibrant, neon-lit market street to a high-altitude industrial rooftop. It begins at ground level, moving past an NCPD officer and yellow market stalls under the glow of holographic cherry blossoms. As the camera reaches a metal fire escape, the perspective shifts from a horizontal stroll to a vertical climb, causing the bustling pedestrian area to recede below. The scene then opens onto a rooftop level where the camera glides past steaming vents and industrial air conditioning units. Finally, the view expands to a top-down vantage point overlooking the distant yellow canopies and the sprawling, neon-illuminated cyberpunk cityscape.
